calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-20-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jeffrey Kent, 415-685-7352, defendant and moving party appearing pro per persona
Cindy Lee, Esq., 415-752-6070 for plaintiff and opposing party L.A.T. Corporation

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT JEFFREY KENT'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgment IS DENIED FOR FAILURE TO FILE AND SERVE THE MOVING PAPERS IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE OST. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
